# Quill

> Quill turns one set of property notes into a complete listing pack for UK estate agents and US real estate teams. Speak or type the facts once and generate a portal-ready description (or MLS-ready remarks), a set of Key Features bullets, a teaser summary, ready-to-post social captions and a buyer email.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, UK/US markets, brand voices, workflow and pricing.
- [UK property listing generator](/uk-property-listing-generator): Deep dive on the UK workflow — Material Information, Rightmove/OnTheMarket-style descriptions, Key Features bullets and compliance.
- [US real estate listing generator](/us-real-estate-listing-generator): Deep dive on the US workflow — MLS remarks, Key Features highlights, Fair Housing guidance and disclosures.
